## CryptoUtils.KeyStore.KeyStore.addSecret() method

Adds a new secret with a randomly generated key.

**Signature:**

```typescript
addSecret(name: string, options?: IAddSecretOptions): Promise<Result<IAddSecretResult>>;
```
